subcodes.first_line: O leaf drawn to the Divine, thy letter was received and a brief reply is herewith written, for there is no time at all [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه منجذبه نامه شما رسید مختصر جواب مرقوم میگردد زیرا ابدا فرصت نیست
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @education of children; moral education, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
